---
title: "Calculate auROC by month on study"
author: "Kendra Wyant"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

### Set Up Environment

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
options(conflicts.policy = "depends.ok")

devtools::source_url("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_data <- format_path("risk2/data_processed/shared")
path_models <- format_path("risk2/models/combined")
```


### Data

```{r}
preds <- read_rds(here::here(path_models,
                             "outer_preds_6_x_5_1_x_5_day_v10_nested_full.rds"))

labels <- read_csv(here::here(path_data, "lapse_labels_24h_day_gps.csv"),
                   show_col_types = FALSE)
```

### Create grouping variable 

Month on study = 30 day increments


```{r}
labels <- labels |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  arrange(window_start) |> 
  mutate(day = row_number(),
         month = case_when(day <= 30 ~ 1,
                           day > 30 & day <= 60 ~ 2,
                           day > 60 & day <= 90 ~ 3,
                           day > 90 & day <= 120 ~ 4,
                           day > 120 & day <= 150 ~ 5,
                           day > 150 & day <= 180 ~ 6,
                           day > 180 & day <= 210 ~ 7,
                           day > 210 & day <= 240 ~ 8,
                           day > 240 & day <= 270 ~ 9,
                           day > 270 & day <= 300 ~ 10,
                           day > 300 & day <= 330 ~ 11,
                           day > 330 ~ 12)) |> 
  ungroup()

janitor::tabyl(labels$month)
labels |> janitor::tabyl(month, lapse)
```


Combine with preds
```{r}
labels <- labels |>
  rename(label = lapse,
         id_obs = label_num)  |> 
  right_join(preds, by = c("id_obs", "label")) |> 
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("Lapse", "No lapse")))
```



### Calculate auROCs by month


```{r}
aurocs <- labels |>
  nest(.by = c(outer_split_num, month), .key = "preds") |>
  mutate(auroc = map(preds,
                     \(preds) roc_auc(preds,
                       truth = label,
                       prob_raw))) |>
  select(-preds) |>
  unnest(auroc) |>
  select(-c(.estimator, .metric)) |> 
  rename(auroc = .estimate)
```


Out of 360 folds (12 * 30), 8 folds without lapse. Filter out missing estimates
```{r}
aurocs |> 
  filter(is.na(auroc)) |> 
  nrow()

aurocs <- aurocs |> 
  filter(!is.na(auroc)) |> 
  glimpse()
```

Get median aurocs
```{r}
aurocs |> 
  group_by(month) |> 
  summarise(auroc = median(auroc))


aurocs |> 
  group_by(month) |> 
  summarise(auroc = median(auroc)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = auroc)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(.5, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 12, 1))

# all data
aurocs |> 
  summarise(auroc = median(auroc))
```
